nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Following the resonance, you arrive at a tranquil lake. At its center rests a giant seashell, tightly closed around a faintly glowing Dreampearl.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: It's there... I can hear it.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: But there's no way to reach it.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The lake stretches endlessly before you. Every stepping stone has crumbled into the water, leaving the Dreampearl completely inaccessible.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: The tremors destroyed the path long ago.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Then we'll make our own.

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Use Rona's Ambition to forge a path across the lake.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Rona steps forward and raises her hand. Waves of pink energy ripple across the lake. Wherever her determination reaches, luminous platforms rise from beneath the water, forging a path toward the giant seashell.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: A path isn't something you wait for...

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: It's something you create.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You carefully cross the newly formed path and arrive before the giant seashell. It remains tightly shut, protecting the Dreampearl inside.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: It's still closed...

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: It seems to be protecting the Dreampearl.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: Then let's prove we're worthy of moving forward.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: As the group steps closer, the path forged by Rona begins to glow. The light reaches the seashell, which slowly opens in response, revealing the radiant Dreampearl within.

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The seashell slowly opens.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: The resonance...

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Obtain the Dreampearl.

nodes.speaker: Rona
nodes.text: We're finally done! Let’s go back now!

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Go back to the Somnolume shrine.
